MULTIPLAYERCARD-ZERO_SUM.title: Pressure On You
MULTIPLAYERCARD-ZERO_SUM.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
A teammate loses {DrainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
Add 1 [gold]Guilty[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCARD-YOU_SO_SELFISH.title: Why Are You So Selfish
MULTIPLAYERCARD-YOU_SO_SELFISH.descripti:
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:4|2} Strength.
A teammate loses 2 HP{IfUpgraded:show: and 1 Max HP|}.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-BORROW_TEAMMATE_TIME.des:
Choose a teammate to gain {IfUpgraded:show:10|3} Doom.
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:3|1} {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-DROP_HANDKERCHIEF.title: Drop Handkerchief
MULTIPLAYERCARD-DROP_HANDKERCHIEF.descri:
Choose a teammate.
Choose 1 card in their hand.
Exchange that card with this card.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-DROP_HANDKERCHIEF.select: Choose a teammate hand card to exchange.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE.title: Friend Fee
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE.description:
After combat, resolve this combat's Gold reward for all players at once.
For each holder of this power targeting you, reduce your combat Gold reward by 25%.
Gain double the total Gold this card made other teammates lose.
